target: eval_conv rank-1 f64 dense fast path, benchmark eval/conv1d_1024x16_5x32_f64_vec

profile_backed_target.profile_command: RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR RCH_FORCE_REMOTE=1 rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/rch-frankenjax-dustyforest-profile cargo bench -p fj-lax --bench lax_baseline -- --sample-size 10 --measurement-time 1 --warm-up-time 1 --noplot
profile_backed_target.finding: claimed eig benchmark was hottest, so the disjoint fj-lax dense conv1d row was selected: eval/conv1d_1024x16_5x32_f64_vec 6.9094 ms [6.8226, 7.0233].

lever: Split large dense f64 conv1d output spaces into scoped-thread morsels over flat output indices. Each output element remains an independent serial k/ci reduction, and each worker writes a disjoint output slice at the exact flat position used by the original push order.
alien_primitive: alien-graveyard vectorized execution / morsel-driven parallelism over independent output tuples; implemented in safe Rust with std::thread::scope and no dependency or FFI.

isomorphism.ordering: Flat output order is unchanged: n ascending, w ascending, co ascending. Thread chunks are disjoint contiguous flat ranges and are joined before TensorValue construction.
isomorphism.tie_breaking: No comparisons or ties are introduced.
isomorphism.floating_point: For every output element, the inner reduction still executes k ascending then ci ascending with the same lhs index, rhs index, multiplication, and addition sequence. No reassociation, SIMD, unsafe, BLAS, LAPACK, MKL, XLA, or mixed precision.
isomorphism.proof_test: conv_1d_parallel_dense_matches_literal_bits compares dense threaded f64 outputs to the literal-backed generic path by f64::to_bits for same, same_lower, and valid stride 2.

baseline.command: RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR RCH_FORCE_REMOTE=1 rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/rch-frankenjax-dustyforest-conv-baseline-remote cargo bench -p fj-lax --bench lax_baseline -- 'eval/conv1d_1024x16_5x32_f64_(vec|literal_ref)|eval/conv2d_32x32x8_3x3x16_f64_vec' --sample-size 10 --measurement-time 1 --warm-up-time 1 --noplot
baseline.revision: HEAD 6e8c75f5, clean detached baseline before this lever

candidate.command: RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR RCH_FORCE_REMOTE=1 rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/rch-frankenjax-dustyforest-conv-after2 cargo bench -p fj-lax --bench lax_baseline -- 'eval/conv1d_1024x16_5x32_f64_(vec|literal_ref)|eval/conv2d_32x32x8_3x3x16_f64_vec' --sample-size 10 --measurement-time 1 --warm-up-time 1 --noplot

result.score: impact 5 (profiled dense conv1d execution hotspot) x confidence 5 (same-worker RCH, stable conv2d control, bit-exact proof) / effort 2 = 12.5
